summary: IDE Workspace fully functional with real backend data. Tested /project/proj_c427dc85e06a route with authenticated session. Backend: 23/23 tests passed including /api/generate-code (Inworld AI), projects CRUD, files API. Frontend: IDE loads real project data, file explorer shows API files, Monaco editor displays content, AI composer sends prompts and receives AI-generated responses (~24s generation time), live preview renders HTML, terminal dock logs operations.

issues: Assistant messages from prompt history not showing data-testid='chat-assistant-message' - only user messages detected (3 user, 0 assistant in initial load). May need to check message rendering for historical prompts vs new prompts.

action_items: Minor: Check why historical assistant messages don't have the chat-assistant-message data-testid (new generation responses work correctly)

workspaceStore.ts properly fetches project data, files, and prompts from API
File save flow works: prompt registration -> code generation -> file save -> refresh
Preview pane correctly builds HTML blob from project files
All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
